description_long: This is a retail package of Faragello Frozen Green Beans, presented in a sealed, pillow-shaped plastic bag. The front of the package features a prominent red and white Faragello logo above a green banner with the product name in both English and Arabic, along with a vivid image of cut green beans. The back of the package displays detailed nutritional information, ingredient lists in multiple languages, and recycling symbols. The sides of the bag are narrow and show partial graphics of green beans, with minimal text. The overall color scheme is predominantly white with green accents and photographic imagery of the beans. The packaging appears lightweight, flexible, and designed for freezer storage.
description: A white, pillow-shaped plastic bag of Faragello Frozen Green Beans with green bean imagery and bilingual labeling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Faragello logo, product name in English and Arabic, and a photo of green beans.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow edge of the bag with partial green bean graphics and minimal text.
description_view_2: Back view displaying nutritional facts, ingredient lists in several languages, and recycling information.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with partial graphics and little text.
attribute_brand_logo: A red and white Faragello logo is visible on the front and back, featuring a stylized 'F' and the brand name in bold letters.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the package clearly states 'Frozen Green Beans' in English and Arabic, with a photo of green beans.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A detailed nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories, serving size, and other nutritional information.
